title: China-Japan Relations: Key Milestones

milestones.title: Modernization
milestones.description: Meiji Restoration sparks large-scale trade. Cultural exchange grows alongside modernization efforts.

milestones.title: Normalization
milestones.description: Joint Communique establishes diplomatic ties and introduces the One China policy framework.

milestones.title: Peace Treaty
milestones.description: Peace and Friendship Treaty is signed. Japanese ODA and investment into China begin to scale.

milestones.title: Strategic Ties
milestones.description: Mutually beneficial relationship is established with focus on East China Sea resource cooperation.

milestones.title: High Tensions
milestones.description: Island disputes escalate, triggering protests and temporarily freezing parts of trade relations.

milestones.title: Eco Security
milestones.description: Hot economics, cold politics: deep integration persists alongside supply chain de-risking.

footerSource: Sources: MOFA Japan, Nippon.com history of relations, CSIS
